reviews.comment:
Lo mejor que tienen SU PERSONAL!!! MUY BUENO el servicio de lavado y EXCELENTE el de lubricantes y aceite, lo cuál es diligentemente atendido por el Empleado que lo realiza. Servicio de Cafetería muy Bueno. Baños limpios y bién presentados. Sólo le faltaría contar con una isla para carga de combustible exclusiva para Socios. Un poco alto el costo del Estacionamiento en su Playa, con una brecha importante respecto del costo en la calle y por encima del de varias Playas Céntricas.

(Translated by Google)
The best thing about them is THEIR STAFF!!! The car wash service is VERY GOOD and the oil and lubricant service is EXCELLENT, diligently handled by the employee who performs it. The cafeteria service is very good. The restrooms are clean and well-maintained. They just need a dedicated fuel pump for members. The parking fee at their beach is a bit high, significantly more expensive than street parking and more expensive than several downtown beaches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZaDlpLXV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de los playeros en todo, además contas con aire para las cubiertas gratis algo que en otros lugares te cobran.-

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very helpful in every way, plus they have free air for the tires, something that other places charge for.

reviews.comment:
En general bueno.los playeros muy buena predisposición baños higiénico y tenes sistema de calibrado de neumático..en el servishop lo recomendable el café buen gusto y aroma y ambiente confortable y tranquilo.

(Translated by Google)
Overall good. The beach attendants were very helpful, the restrooms were hygienic, and they have a tire pressure monitoring system. The service shop is recommended for its tasty and aromatic coffee and comfortable and quiet atmosphere.
